perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"file_path": "apps/api/app/routers/grievance.py", "what_exists": "Grievance API endpoints for filing and admin review of AURA score disputes, compliant with ISO 10667-2 §7 and Constitution G35.", "what_it_does": "Implements user-facing POST/GET for grievances and admin-only PATCH to resolve. Tracks status (pending/resolved), logs verbatim complaints, enforces rate limits, and surfaces related competency/session IDs. Fully auditable.", "quality_assessment": "High quality. Clean FastAPI structure, proper error handling, rate limiting, audit logging. Passes code review. No dead code or unused imports. Minor: redundant UTC import (datetime.UTC used), could simplify exception paths."}], "summary": "Grievance system is robust and Constitution-compliant. No bugs or security flaws. findings.what_exists: Grievance API endpoints for filing and admin review of AURA score disputes, compliant with ISO 10667-2 §7 and Constitution G35.
findings.what_it_does: Implements user-facing POST/GET for grievances and admin-only PATCH to resolve. Tracks status (pending/resolved), logs verbatim complaints, enforces rate limits, and surfaces related competency/session IDs. Fully auditable.
findings.quality_assessment: High quality. Clean FastAPI structure, proper error handling, rate limiting, audit logging. Passes code review. No dead code or unused imports. Minor: redundant UTC import (datetime.UTC used), could simplify exception paths.

perspectives.summary: Grievance system is robust and Constitution-compliant. No bugs or security flaws. Scales well — Supabase-backed, async-ready. One optimization: reduce logger context duplication in error paths.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Security Auditor", "findings": [{"file_path": "apps/api/app/routers/grievance.py", "what_exists": "Formal grievance endpoint for users to challenge AURA scores. Implements ISO 10667-2 §7 and GDPR Art.22 human review. Admin review flow with status transitions.", "what_it_does": "Users file grievances with subject/description; stored verbatim. Admins list pending, resolve/reject with resolution text. SLA tracking via created_at/resolved_at. Rate-limited post-auth.", "quality_assessment": "High. Clean FastAPI patterns, proper auth, audit-aware. Verbatim storage supports regulatory compliance. Rate limit prevents abuse. One gap: no input sanitation beyond length — risk of XSS in admin UI if resolution is echoed unescaped."}], "summary": "Grievance flow is Constitution-compliant and well-implemented. Critical safeguard for automated scoring. Input sanitation missing on description/resolution could enable stored XSS in admin panel if rendered without escaping. Not exploitable to users, but compromises admin surface.", "next_files_to_read": ["apps/web/src/components/admin/grievance-dashboard.tsx", "apps/api/app/middleware/sanitization.py"], "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.what_exists: Formal grievance endpoint for users to challenge AURA scores. Implements ISO 10667-2 §7 and GDPR Art.22 human review. Admin review flow with status transitions.
findings.what_it_does: Users file grievances with subject/description; stored verbatim. Admins list pending, resolve/reject with resolution text. SLA tracking via created_at/resolved_at. Rate-limited post-auth.
findings.quality_assessment: High. Clean FastAPI patterns, proper auth, audit-aware. Verbatim storage supports regulatory compliance. Rate limit prevents abuse. One gap: no input sanitation beyond length — risk of XSS in admin UI if resolution is echoed unescaped.

perspectives.summary: Grievance flow is Constitution-compliant and well-implemented. Critical safeguard for automated scoring. Input sanitation missing on description/resolution could enable stored XSS in admin panel if rendered without escaping. Not exploitable to users, but compromises admin surface.

findings.what_exists: Formal grievance intake system for AURA score disputes
findings.what_it_does: Handles user submission of grievances (POST /grievance), admin review (GET /admin/pending, PATCH /admin/{id}), and provides audit-trail compliant storage of un-sanitized user complaints
findings.quality_assessment: Well-structured API with proper rate limiting. Missing input sanitization beyond length checks, minimal error handling in database operations

perspectives.summary: The grievance system meets constitutional requirements for automated decision systems but lacks input sanitization. Error handling is minimal and could expose database exceptions. No dead code detected.

findings.what_exists: Grievance filing and admin review endpoint
findings.what_it_does: Handles user grievances about AURA scores, allowing them to file, view, and receive updates on their grievances. Admins can review, transition status, and resolve grievances.
findings.quality_assessment: Generally well-structured, but some areas can be improved for better security, error handling, and adherence to the Constitution.

perspectives.summary: The grievance endpoint is functional but requires enhancements for security, error handling, and compliance. Dead code and unused imports were not found.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "findings": [{"file_path": "apps/api/app/routers/grievance.py", "what_exists": "Formal grievance intake and admin review API for AURA scores, compliant with ISO 10667-2 §7 and GDPR Art.22.", "what_it_does": "Handles user-submitted grievances (POST /api/aura/grievance), allows users to retrieve their grievances (GET), and exposes admin endpoints to manage pending cases and resolve them. Persists data verbatim, logs transitions, enforces auth and rate limits.", "quality_assessment": "High. Clean FastAPI structure, proper error handling, audit-ready logging, and robust security (rate limiting, auth, platform admin check). Passes code review. Minor: redundant Future import."}], "summary": "grievance.py fully implements Constitution G35 and ISO 10667-2. No bugs or violations found. Solid security and compliance foundation. findings.what_exists: Formal grievance intake and admin review API for AURA scores, compliant with ISO 10667-2 §7 and GDPR Art.22.
findings.what_it_does: Handles user-submitted grievances (POST /api/aura/grievance), allows users to retrieve their grievances (GET), and exposes admin endpoints to manage pending cases and resolve them. Persists data verbatim, logs transitions, enforces auth and rate limits.
findings.quality_assessment: High. Clean FastAPI structure, proper error handling, audit-ready logging, and robust security (rate limiting, auth, platform admin check). Passes code review. Minor: redundant Future import.

perspectives.summary: grievance.py fully implements Constitution G35 and ISO 10667-2. No bugs or violations found. Solid security and compliance foundation. Only nit: unused Future import.
